seoTitle: How to Use HubSpot for Lead Generation in 2026
metaDescription: Build an inbound lead funnel in HubSpot: create a landing page, add capture forms and pop-up CTAs, and trigger automated follow-up emails.
intro: Turning website visitors into leads takes more than just a contact form buried on a page. This guide shows how to use HubSpot's marketing tools to build a full capture funnel, from a dedicated landing page to automated follow-up emails, so you can start collecting and nurturing leads with less manual work.

steps.heading: Create a landing page
steps.body: In the HubSpot Marketing dashboard, open the Landing Pages tool and start from one of the optimized template frameworks.

steps.heading: Add a lead capture form
steps.body: Use the Form Builder to drag custom fields like name, email, and job title into your page, along with any required checkboxes.

steps.heading: Add a pop-up CTA
steps.body: Build a sticky pop-up call-to-action and place it on high-traffic blog posts to capture visitors who are about to leave.

steps.heading: Automate the follow-up
steps.body: Connect your form to an automated workflow that sends an instant welcome email delivering a lead magnet or booking link.

steps.heading: Track conversions
steps.body: Open the analytics dashboard to review form impressions and conversion rates so you can refine the funnel over time.

faq.question: Do I need a paid HubSpot plan to build landing pages?
faq.answer: HubSpot offers landing page and form tools on its free CRM tier with limited features, while more advanced templates and automation typically require a paid Marketing Hub plan.

faq.question: Can I add pop-up CTAs to pages outside HubSpot?
faq.answer: Yes, HubSpot's pop-up forms can generally be embedded on any web page using a tracking script, not just pages built in HubSpot.

faq.question: How fast does the automated follow-up email send after someone submits a form?
faq.answer: Workflow-triggered emails typically fire within moments of a form submission, though exact timing depends on how the workflow is configured.

faq.question: Where do I check how many leads a landing page is generating?
faq.answer: The analytics dashboard shows real-time impressions, submissions, and conversion rate data for each landing page and form.
